step_rationale: Pleiotropic growth factor; promotes cardiac inflammation and remodeling post-MI.
mechanism: Midkine amplifies post-MI myocardial inflammation and adverse remodeling through growth-factor signaling on the plaque-inflammation and systemic-response axes.

references.title: In-depth proteomics approach reveals novel biomarkers of cardiac remodelling after myocardial infarction: An exploratory analysis.
references.journal: Journal of cellular and molecular medicine
